title: bupleurum paniculatum var. acutifolium
intro: Bupleurum paniculatum var. acutifolium, also known as Chinese bupleurum, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and supporting the immune system. Bupleurum paniculatum var. acutifolium can be prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to create traditional Chinese medicinal formulas.
